name: cult-vote-tally
title: Vote Tally
author: Cult UI
description: Manages controlled or uncontrolled vote counts through composable list controls.

changes: Marked the optional sorting wrapper presentational, made default trigger names item-specific, and announced count updates politely.
Changed the root and item hosts from ul/li to div elements with list/listitem roles so the optional sorting wrapper remains valid HTML and transparent to list semantics.

modifications.change: Marked the sorting wrapper presentational, made trigger labels item-specific, made count updates polite live regions, and changed the root/item hosts to div elements with list/listitem roles.
modifications.reason: Disambiguate repeated controls, expose vote changes, and preserve valid list semantics when the optional sorting wrapper is used.
